title: Kerala High Court acquits one more in 2018 Attappady lynching case, upholds conviction of twelve
description: The Kerala High Court on Monday acquitted one of the men accused in the Attappady lynching case, which concerns the death of a tribal man named Madhu in 2018 [Hussain v State of Kerala & Ors.].A Division Bench of Justice Raja Vijayaraghavan V and Justice KV Jayakumar set aside the conviction and sentence imposed on one Hussain, the first accused in the case.The High Court upheld the conviction of twelve others for various serious offences, including under Sections 304 (causing death by negli
